channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Engages in Dialogue and Investigation to Promote Post-Election Healing
item.description: After the October 29, 2025 General Election, Tanzania experienced tension and uncertainty. President Samia Suluhu Hassan’s government is now taking concrete steps to promote national healing and stren...

item.title: US plans to escort oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz amid tensions with Iran
item.description: The United States Navy is set to provide escort for oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz, collaborating with an international coalition, according to US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. T...

item.title: Ontario lawyer referred to Law Society for submitting fabricated legal quotations in court
item.description: An Ontario lawyer, Khalid Parvaiz, has come under scrutiny for submitting seven fabricated quotations from court cases during a legal dispute over real estate investments. Parvaiz claims the errors we...

item.title: Israeli airstrikes hit Beirut seafront, killing 12 and wounding 28 amid rising tensions
item.description: On Thursday, a deadly Israeli strike targeted the Ramlet al-Bayda seafront in central Beirut, killing 12 people and injuring 28, according to Lebanon’s health ministry. This area had become a temporar...

item.title: ASX dips as miners falter despite oil rally and iron ore gains
item.description: Australian shares took a hit on Friday as major miners struggled to offset gains in the energy sector amid renewed concerns over the Iran conflict. The S&P/ASX 200 Index fell by 26.9 points, or 0.3 pe...

item.title: Google Will Release Official Chrome Build for ARM64 Linux in 2026
item.description: Google has announced that it will release an official version of Chrome for ARM64 Linux in the second quarter of 2026. Until now, Linux users running ARM-based hardware had to rely on unofficial build...

item.title: Pakistan Engages China Diplomatically to De-escalate Border Tensions with Afghanistan
item.description: The Foreign Office of Pakistan has confirmed ongoing engagement with China to help reduce recent tensions along the Pakistan-Afghanistan border. Spokesperson Tahir Andrabi stated during a weekly brief...

item.title: Ondo APC holds court-approved congress, announces new leadership team
item.description: The Ondo State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) don finally hold one fresh congress on Wednesday wey follow the Federal High Court order. The court don earlier stop APC and INEC from con...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi Criticises Government’s Foreign Policy Over Energy Security Amid Global Oil Disruptions
item.description: Opposition leader and Lok Sabha Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi has raised serious concerns about India’s energy security, blaming it on what he calls a flawed foreign policy. Speaking to reporters ...

item.title: Cleophas Malala Denies Allegations of Undermining Rigathi Gachagua in DCP
item.description: Former Kakamega Senator Cleophas Malala has come out to dismiss claims by Kirinyaga Woman Representative Njeri Maina that he is plotting against former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua. Njeri alleged...

item.title: The importance of using editors and proofreaders for clear communication
item.description: When you dey write for public consumption, you must know say nobody perfect. Even if you think your English is strong, mistakes fit show anyhow. Dis article explain why getting a second pair of eyes—e...

item.title: Nairobi floods reveal long‑term failure in city planning and leadership
item.description: The article argues that Nairobi’s recurring floods are not mainly a weather problem, but a symptom of poor leadership and bad urban planning. The writer explains that every rainy season the city turns...

item.title: U.S. Reports Suggest Iranian Government Remains Stable Despite Ongoing Conflict
item.description: Recent U.S. intelligence assessments suggest that the Iranian government remains stable and is not facing imminent collapse, even after nearly two weeks of sustained U.S. and Israeli military operatio...

item.title: Miguel Cardoso criticises PSL for congested schedule ahead of Sundowns’ CAF quarterfinal
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso has voiced strong concerns over the Premier Soccer League's scheduling, which he says hampers the club’s preparation for their CAF Champions League quarterfinal ...

item.title: South Africans in UAE teaching and hospitality sectors stay despite regional tensions
item.description: Many South Africans working in the UAE, particularly in teaching and hospitality, are choosing to stay despite the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The Department of International Relations and Co...

item.title: Andy Carroll reduces asking price to finalise divorce and move on with new relationship
item.description: Andy Carroll is seeking to sell the Essex mansion he once shared with his ex-wife, Billi Mucklow, in a bid to finalise their divorce and move forward with his new partner, celebrity hair stylist Lou T...

item.title: Iraq Suspends Oil Terminals After Attacks Amid Rising Tensions in Gulf Region
item.description: Recent developments in West Asia have escalated tensions and disrupted global energy supply. Iraq has suspended operations at all its oil terminals following attacks on two oil tankers near Basra, whi...

item.title: ROTC students intervene to stop school shooting at Old Dominion University
item.description: In a dramatic incident at Old Dominion University in Virginia, a shooter entered the campus, leaving one person dead and two others injured. The situation was quickly brought under control by ROTC stu...

item.title: Opposition halts FC upgrade bill due to lack of quorum in National Assembly
item.description: On Thursday, the opposition in Pakistan's National Assembly stopped the passage of a bill intended to transform the Frontier Constabulary (FC) into the Federal Constabulary, citing absence of quorum. ...

item.title: US Embassy Issues Security Advisory for American Citizens in Nigeria
item.description: The U.S. Embassy for Abuja don release fresh security alert sey e get possible terrorist threat wey fit target American facilities and U.S.-affiliated schools for Nigeria. The advisory wey dem post fo...
